terms.label: LLM Agents
terms.description: Language-model agents that plan, act, use tools, or execute multi-step tasks.

terms.label: Tool Use
terms.description: External API/tool calling, tool learning, function calling, and execution feedback.

terms.label: Evaluation
terms.description: Evaluation methodology, metrics, protocols, reliability studies, and error analysis.

terms.label: Benchmarks
terms.description: Datasets, benchmark suites, tasks, and leaderboards used for empirical comparison.

terms.label: Planning
terms.description: Task decomposition, search, reflection, retry, control flow, and long-horizon planning.

terms.label: Retrieval
terms.description: Retrieval augmented generation, indexing, search, memory lookup, and context selection.

terms.label: Multi-Agent
terms.description: Multiple agents, role specialization, collaboration, debate, or distributed coordination.

terms.label: Knowledge Graphs
terms.description: Graph-structured knowledge, entity/relation extraction, graph memory, and graph reasoning.

terms.label: Reasoning
terms.description: Reasoning strategies, chain-of-thought-like methods, verification, and problem solving.

terms.label: Safety
terms.description: Robustness, harmful behavior, alignment, guardrails, trustworthiness, and risk control.

terms.label: Fine-Tuning
terms.description: Supervised tuning, preference optimization, instruction tuning, and model adaptation.

terms.label: Datasets
terms.description: Data collection, curation, annotation, synthesis, and dataset quality.

terms.label: Systems
terms.description: Runtime systems, orchestration, infrastructure, latency, cost, and deployment engineering.

terms.label: Multimodal
terms.description: Vision-language, audio-language, document understanding, and multimodal interaction.

terms.label: Human-AI Interaction
terms.description: User studies, interfaces, collaboration, feedback, and human-in-the-loop workflows.

terms.label: Robotics
terms.description: Embodied agents, control, manipulation, navigation, imitation, and real-world robotics.
